description:
Using SketchUp Make 2017, create a 3D model of a single-story residential building with a gable roof matching the following specifications:
- Footprint: 50 feet long by 28 feet wide (1,400 sq ft).
- Walls: Extrude the footprint up 9 feet to create the vertical eave walls.
- Roof: Create a symmetrical gable roof with the ridge running along the 50-foot axis.
- Pitch: Use a 5:12 roof pitch. To achieve this, draw a ridge line across the top face connecting the midpoints of the 28-foot edges, and move the line straight up (along the blue axis) by 5 feet 10 inches.
- You may use any valid SketchUp modeling approach (Rectangle, Push/Pull, Line, Move tools) as long as the final geometry matches a gable roof building.
- Once finished, save the model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\gable_roof_building.skp'.
